question: How many days had passed since I bought my Adidas running shoes when I realized one of the shoelaces on my old Converse sneakers had broken?
ground_truth_answer: 14 days. 15 days (including the last day) is also acceptable.

judge_response.label: CORRECT
judge_response.reasoning: The retrieved context provides both key dates needed to answer the question: Adidas running shoes purchased on January 10th and Converse shoelace broken on January 24th, which is 14 days apart (or 15 including the last day), matching the gold answer.
